flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Florida Gateway College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (64.3% → 53.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Florida Gateway College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Florida Gateway College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1k → 2.3k).
